creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: pi
Date: Sun May 15 02:11:11 UTC 2016

URL: https://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/415206

Log:
  mail/p5-Email-MIME-RFC2047: 0.93 -> 0.95

  - Don't add whitespace between quoted strings
  - Allow period in phrase
  - Optimize regexes
  - Support RFC2822 comments
  - Rework documentation
  - Improve test suite

  PR:		209507
  Submitted by:	Henk van Oers <hvo.pm@xs4all.nl> (maintainer)
